summary: Frontend-only testing of Just Ride Cycles marketing website. All major sections tested and working. No backend used.

ui_bugs.issue: Road Bikes category card image appears broken/not loading (shown as alt text 'Road Bikes' on white background)

issues: Footer shows 3 columns visible in viewport but layout is fine at 4 columns total - acceptable

action_items: Road Bikes category card image may be failing to load (pinkRoadBike Unsplash URL) - verify image is accessible
Gallery images don't have data-testid attributes - minor testability issue
critical_code_review_comments: Cycle cards and gallery images lack data-testid attributes making automated selection harder
BuyersGuide step cards have no identifiable class matching 'step' or 'guide' - step numbers confirmed visible in screenshots
Road Bikes category image (IMAGES.pinkRoadBike from Unsplash) may load slowly or fail intermittently
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static marketing site tested. Hero, navbar, trust bar, categories (4), cycle showcase (6 cards + 6 enquire WA buttons), rentals (dark bg, Hourly/Daily/Weekly), gallery (6 images + lightbox working), contact (Google Maps iframe + details), footer (social strip + 4 columns), floating buttons (WA + call), mobile hamburger - all working. All WA links correctly point to 918947774778.

features_verified.hero_section: PASS - shop exterior photo, Find Your Perfect Ride headline, View Cycles + Rent Now buttons
features_verified.navbar_sticky: PASS - logo, WhatsApp Us btn visible
features_verified.categories_4: PASS - Mountain, Road, Kids, Gear visible
features_verified.rentals_section: PASS - dark bg, Hourly/Daily/Weekly, Book a Rental on WhatsApp
features_verified.gallery_lightbox: PASS - 6 images, lightbox opens on click
features_verified.floating_buttons: PASS - floating WA + call buttons visible
features_verified.mobile_hamburger: PASS - hamburger menu visible and clickable on mobile
